movie.actors: Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci, Rene Russo
movie.plot: Martin Riggs and Roger Murtaugh, after escaping death from the previous movies are put on a hit list by The Triads. When blood thirsty mercenaries are on their tail they team up again with Leo Getz and Lorna Cole, a newcomer (Chris Rock) to finally put an end to the Triads for good.
movie.title: Lethal Weapon 4
movie.writer: Shane Black (characters), Jonathan Lemkin (story), Alfred Gough (story), Miles Millar (story), Channing Gibson (screenplay)
